The '''Avhn-Bendara system''' was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy's]] [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]. It contained the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ryvellia]].

{{System-stub}}
